title: Happy Macaw perched on Branch Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this easy happy macaw perched on branch coloring sheet. Perfect for toddlers and young kids with thick outlines and large coloring spaces. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Macaws are large, colorful parrots native to Central and South America, known for their loud vocalizations.
The powerful beak of a Macaw can easily crush hard nutshells and seeds, which are primary foods in the rainforest.
